headline: Should You Buy Howmet Aerospace After a 33% Rally in 6 Months?
summary: HWM shares jump 33% in six months as strong commercial and defense aerospace demand, rising aircraft production and shareholder payouts fuel momentum.

headline: ATI's Shares Rally 45% in 3 Months: Time to Buy the Stock?
summary: ATI stock jumps 45% in three months as aerospace demand, engine content growth and strategic CapEx lift prospects, while strong cash flow and earnings outlook support momentum.

headline: HWM- A Top Defense Stock to Buy on Pullbacks
summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz and the Iranian attacks on neighboring countries’ energy infrastructure have caused investors’ fear to spike. But it gives you an opportunity to add to your long-term equity positions. One I like is Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM), remarks Jim Woods, editor of Forecasts & Strategies.
